name: PromptInject
desc: PromptInject is a framework that assembles prompts in a modular fashion to provide a quantitative analysis of the robustness of LLMs to adversarial prompt atta…
descFull: PromptInject is a framework that assembles prompts in a modular fashion to provide a quantitative analysis of the robustness of LLMs to adversarial prompt attacks. 🏆 Best Paper Awards @ NeurIPS ML Safety Workshop 2022
